channel.title: Food on Martin Blackburn
channel.description: Recent content in Food on Martin Blackburn

item.title: Gnocchi with Chicken & Tomatoes
item.description: Sometimes when you’re in a rush it can be tempting to eat lots of snacks, or just a bowl of cereal (not that there is anything wrong with cereal). Having a few quick to make recipes to hand is always a good thing and you’ll feel less guilty than eating just junk food. This recipe will serve 2-4 people, depending on people’s appetites. Ingredients 250g chicken breast 450g gnocchi 300g cherry tomatoes 50g fresh basil Prep Cut the chicken into chunks, about 2cm each Cut the tomatoes in half Tear the basil into small pieces Instructions Cook the gnocchi according to package directions.
